[2018-06-16 00:37] awaclus: it more like prevents your opponent from absorbing at all

[2018-06-16 21:25] miccull. (Miccull): why do people find feral warden so good ?
[2018-06-16 21:25] miccull. (Miccull): am i missing somerthing about the unit ?
[2018-06-16 21:26] 1m2o: it absorb for turn and deal damage
[2018-06-16 21:26] 1m2o: it's like wall for a turn which deal damage afterwards
[2018-06-16 21:26] awaclus: it absorbs for 2 and then it deals damage forever
[2018-06-16 21:26] darkeisbein: it's a permanent attacker that also gives you two absorb
[2018-06-16 21:26] 1m2o: it also doesn't require you to go to blue instantly
[2018-06-16 21:26] darkeisbein: and in colors that usually don't have access to absorb
[2018-06-16 21:26] awaclus: if you buy one of them every turn, it's like you just have a free wall out of nowhere
[2018-06-16 21:26] awaclus: while you're building fairly efficient attackers
[2018-06-16 21:27] darkeisbein: also if the opponent has something like frostbites it's really good at countering the threat
[2018-06-16 21:27] awaclus: a lot of the time, Feral Warden's presence makes it a red green rush
[2018-06-16 21:27] awaclus: unless there's a super good big absorber
[2018-06-16 21:28] darkeisbein: yeah, simply because it means you can go for the great attack ramp of red while also getting absorb ususually reserved for blue strats
[2018-06-16 21:29] miccull. (Miccull): ok , makes sense, thanks
